title: nepeta ouroumitanensis
intro: Nepeta ouroumitanensis, also known as the Ouromitan Catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, characterized by its purple flowers and aromatic foliage. The medicinal properties of Nepeta ouroumitanensis lie in its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from digestive issues and colds. Herbal preparations of Nepeta ouroumitanensis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for convenient and accessible use of its medicinal properties.
